title: Skirmish on Honoghr

{{Quote|There's a remote Imperial colony on Honoghr. If we start by subverting the Imperial officials there, it shouldn't attract undue attention. Of course, we could set up another racketeering operation here. But I believe that in order to truly make our mark...we need intimidation.|[[Tyber Zann]]|<ref name="Forces" />}}
A '''skirmish''' took place on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], shortly after the [[Ground Battle on Kessel|jailbreak]] on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

==Prelude==
{{Quote|We move quickly, otherwise our forces will be overwhelmed by Noghri assassins. I have heard boastful rumors of their battle skills, so this should be a good challenge.|Urai Fen before the Skirmish on Honoghr|<ref name="Forces" />}}
When [[Tyber Zann]] was freed, his [[Zann Consortium/Legends|criminal empire]] was in ruins. In order to re-establish it, he needed to let the galaxy know he was back and as dangerous as ever. Knowing the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri's]] reputation as fierce warriors, it seemed apparent that getting the Noghri scared of them would give the Zann's reputation as something to be feared a start.

==The Attack==
A [[Defiler]] was sent to the planet, who managed to assemble a strike team out of the Consortium's reserves, and [[Urai Fen]] also participated. Urai took charge of the mission from there, and the strike team landed. As the Consortium's forces marched forward, several Noghri Warriors and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] went to meet them.

The battle was over quickly, with three Noghri dwellings destroyed as Zann's soldiers moved further north to meet [[Malinth]], the commander of Imperial forces. [[Malinth]] rushed towards them in hopes of destroying them, but he died in his attempt.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Even Vader's assassins proved no match for our forces. This victory ensures that word of the Zann Consortium spreads quickly.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="Forces" />}}
News spread quickly of the Empire's defeat on Honoghr, gaining Tyber Zann more respect in the criminal underworld. The Noghri began to fear him slightly.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
